test_suite.name: ProcessApp RAG Pipeline Validation
test_suite.purpose: Validate RAG pipeline and detect duplication

documents.description: Plain text document for testing native text processing
documents.expected_pipeline: Direct to KB Sync → Bedrock Chunking → Embedding → Vector Index

validation_queries.query: What embedding model does ProcessApp use?
What is the cost advantage of S3 Vectors?
How often does the Knowledge Base sync?

documents.description: Word document (simulated as TXT) for testing DOCX processing
documents.expected_pipeline: Direct to KB Sync → Bedrock Processing
documents.note: In actual testing, use real .docx file

validation_queries.query: What is the development account ID?

validation_queries.expected_answer: Stage-based isolation with separate S3 buckets, IAM roles, and KMS keys per stage

validation_queries.query: What PII types does the guardrail detect?
validation_queries.expected_answer: SSN, credit cards, email addresses, phone numbers

documents.description: PDF document (text simulation) for testing OCR pipeline
documents.expected_pipeline: OCR Lambda → Textract → Text Extraction → KB Sync → Bedrock Processing
documents.note: For real testing, use actual PDF with scanned images

validation_queries.query: What OCR service does ProcessApp use?
validation_queries.expected_answer: AWS Textract with TABLES and FORMS features
S3 Upload → EventBridge → OCR Lambda → Textract Async Job → SNS Notification → Text Extraction

validation_queries.query: Is Textract processing synchronous or asynchronous?

test_a_current_pipeline.description: Test with current architecture (includes Embedder Lambda)
steps: Upload document to S3 docs bucket
Query agent or KB retrieve API
critical_validations: Are embeddings written to regular vectorsBucket?
Does Bedrock KB read from regular vectorsBucket?

test_b_bedrock_native.description: Test Bedrock native pipeline (skip Embedder Lambda)
steps: Upload document to S3 docs bucket
Test query via KB retrieve API

success_criteria.decision: If Test B succeeds → Proceed with Phase 2.5 simplification
